mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.project_id AS "projectId", a.title, a.description, a.issue_attachments AS "issueAttachments", a.reported_by AS "reportedBy", a.reported_at AS "reportedAt", a.assigned_by AS "assignedBy", a.assigned_at AS "assignedAt", a.rectification_deadline AS "rectificationDeadline", a.rectification_count AS "rectificationCount", a.rectification_description AS "rectificationDescription", a.rectification_attachments AS "rectificationAttachments", a.rectification_user_id AS "rectificationUserId", a.rectification_submitted_at AS "rectificationSubmittedAt", a.review_user_id AS "reviewUserId", a.review_result AS "reviewResult", a.review_remark AS "reviewRemark", a.review_attachments AS "reviewAttachments", a.reviewed_at AS "reviewedAt", a.closed_by AS "closedBy", a.closed_at AS "closedAt", a.status, a.created_by AS "createdBy", a.created_at AS "createdAt", a.updated_by AS "updatedBy", a.updated_at AS "updatedAt", p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", reporter.name AS "reportedByName", assigned.name AS "assignedByName", rectifier.name AS "rectificationUserName", reviewer.name AS "reviewUserName", closer.name AS "closedByName" FROM issue_ticket a LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN sys_account reporter ON reporter.id = a.reported_by LEFT JOIN sys_account assigned ON assigned.id = a.assigned_by LEFT JOIN sys_account rectifier ON rectifier.id = a.rectification_user_id LEFT JOIN sys_account reviewer ON reviewer.id = a.review_user_id LEFT JOIN sys_account closer ON closer.id = a.closed_by WHERE a.id = #{id}
